rulePubDate:
<js>
sort="";
result=java.getElements('.text-xs');
len=result.length-1
for(i=len;i>=0;i--){
	t=result[i].text();
	i==len?sort+='🕒'+t:sort+='  '+t;
}
sort
</js>
